mainText:
~~~

Visit Bank of Entitlement dot com for more.

ENTITLEMENT STORY:  Bank of Entitlement Promo: "At Bank of Entitlement, your dreams are our demands! Get ready to be pampered like royalty with our exclusive VIP banking experience. Because you deserve nothing less!"So there I was, strolling into Bank of Entitlement with my entourage in tow-sunglasses on, attitude set to maximum fabulousness. As the CEO, naturally, I was immediately whisked away to the private suite, where a red carpet awaited my every step.I settled into my golden throne-like chair, surrounded by fluttering bank tellers who fanned me with crisp bills. "Hot Josh," they whispered in reverent tones, "how may we serve you today?"Feeling utterly entitled, I decided it was time to test the limits of my VIP status. "I demand a parade in my honor," I declared, my voice booming with self-importance. The tellers scurried off, and within minutes, the streets outside were filled with the sounds of trumpets and cheers.As I waved graciously from my window, tossing golden coins to the adoring masses below, a sense of satisfaction washed over me. Yes, I thought, this is what true entitlement feels like-absolutely, gloriously justified.And so it was, in that moment of over-the-top extravagance, that I knew-Bank of Entitlement was not just a bank. It was a lifestyle befitting the one and only Hot Josh.
